Log:

  - Pass maintainership to submitter

Modified:

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Markdown Perl5 module
 
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
+
